entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop produced by smallholders in Malawi.

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where the study on groundnut producers was conducted.

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD-LEVEL DEMAND FUNCTION ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analytical approach used to assess the demand for post-harvest mechanization.

entities.name: COMMUNITY-LEVEL BENEFIT COST ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analytical approach used to assess the economic viability of post-harvest mechanization at the community level.

entities.name: EX-ANTE ASSESSMENT
entities.description: A prospective assessment conducted before the implementation of a policy or technology.

entities.name: SMALL-SCALE POST-HARVEST MECHANIZATION
entities.description: The use of small-scale machinery for operations after the harvest of crops.

entities.name: COMPATIBLE TECHNOLOGY INTERNATIONAL
entities.description: An organization that designed labor-saving equipment for groundnut production.

entities.name: LIFTER
entities.description: A labor-saving harvester equipment designed for groundnut production.

entities.name: STRIPPER
entities.description: A labor-saving thresher equipment designed for groundnut production.

entities.name: SHELLER
entities.description: A labor-saving dehuller equipment designed for groundnut production.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: An international research organization partnering in the design of post-harvest equipment.

entities.name: DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH SERVICES
entities.description: A government agency partnering in the design of post-harvest equipment.

entities.name: C-TO-C ENGINEERING
entities.description: An engineering firm partnering in the design of post-harvest equipment.

entities.name: CLUB GOODS
entities.description: A type of economic good that is excludable but non-rivalrous.

entities.name: ARTIFICIALLY SCARCE GOODS
entities.description: Goods that could be non-rivalrous but are made excludable to create scarcity.

entities.name: WILLINGNESS-TO-PAY
entities.description: The maximum amount a consumer is willing to pay for a service or product.

entities.name: FARMER RESEARCH NETWORK
entities.description: A collaborative network of farmers used for data collection.

entities.name: GENDER DISAGGREGATED HOUSEHOLD INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A data collection method that separates responses by gender.

entities.name: RETURN ON INVESTMENT
entities.description: A performance measure used to evaluate the efficiency of an investment.

entities.name: SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: A technique used to determine how different values of an independent variable affect a particular dependent variable.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE ADOPTION
entities.description: The long-term and viable uptake of a technology by users.
